arts.ttl: Monchi pushing signing for Aston Villa – Odd cries for mercy, middle-ground deal looks likely
arts.sum: On Monday, we carried claims from Spain regarding Aston Villa’s initial offer for Loïc Badé. Diego Costa heading off for new horizons in the Turkish Super Lig meant the Premier League club were able to move more concretely for the Sevilla player. arts.sum: Denis Zakaria has recovered from an illness, whilst Wilfried Singo has recovered from a minor back injury which saw him miss out on Friday’s defeat to Montpellier HSC. Both are…

arts.ttl: Unai Emery lifts lid on 'very important' conversation with Youri Tielemans
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery believes Youri Tielemans' best qualities are "his mind and his mentality". After a slow start last season, the Belgian now believes he is playing the best football of his career and Emery has hailed his commitment in striving for improvement after hitting a low point in his career 20 months ago.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Monaco – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa travel to Monaco on Tuesday evening with Champions League qualification in their grasp. Unai Emery’s side are fifth in the standings and in the automatic qualification places. A win in the principality will consolidate their position ahead of the final round of league phase fixtures. Villa warmed up for the clash with a […] The post Aston Villa XI vs Monaco – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'Everyone knows it' - Ezri Konsa makes Tyrone Mings point after return from injury - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: "I don’t think we have lost a game since I’ve played alongside him [this season] so to have him back, it’s a great feeling. Aston Villa's Ezri Konsa has praised Tyrone Mings' 'amazing' performances since he returned from a devastating ACL injury at the start of last season.

arts.sum: The Villa boss has set his side a target of six points from the two matches to ensure they finish in the top eight

arts.sum: Aston Villa completed the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund for £21million less than eight months after he helped the German club reach the Champions League final
